'''Marie Severin''' was a comic book artist who worked as a [[Wikipedia:penciller|penciller]], [[Wikipedia:inker|inker]], and [[Wikipedia:colorist|colorist]]. She contributed to a few issues of [[Marvel Comics]]' [[1977]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] series, as well as issues of [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Droids'']] and [[Ewoks (Marvel)|''Ewoks'']].
